title: tacca pinnatifida var. maculata
intro: Tacca pinnatifida var. maculata, also known as the Polynesian arrowroot or maculata taccaca, is a rare and unique variety of the Tacca pinnatifida plant, belonging to the yam family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is rich in starch, which has been used to thicken sauces and as a thickening agent in various culinary applications. The health benefits of Tacca pinnatifida var. maculata include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by boiling the roots and rhizomes, which can be used as a medicinal tea or applied topically to alleviate skin issues.
